form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd in a NG on April 12 over 525m at this track behind Raven Peter beaten 2.5 lengths (30.95). Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 525m (30.77) beating Flying Nash in NG on April 12. Was strongly supported last start and ran right away with it. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths second but did record a slick 30.57 over the 525m trip. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 525m at this track. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a NG on April 12 over 525m at this track behind Raven Peter beaten 2.5 lengths (30.95). Has an excellent 30.41 best time at this course and distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at Murray Bridge Straight over 300m (17.29) beating Rio Hope in Grade 6 on April 8. Prepared to risk on this occasion.
